title: nephelium connatum
intro: Nephelium connatum, also known as the Rambai, is a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its health benefits. The extracts of Nephelium connatum have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throat, and digestive issues, and its health benefits also include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various ways.
